name: Fruit and Tofu Pie
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Firm tofu, squeezed to remove moisture
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat electric oven to 350°F.
2. In a bowl, combine peaches, coconut, 1/4 cup of the honey, flour, half teaspoon of cinnamon, and nutmeg. Mix gently; spoon into pie shell.
3. In a blender, add tofu, eggs (or egg substitute), cream cheese, remaining 3/4 cup honey, remaining half teaspoon cinnamon, salt, and vanilla. Cover and blend until smooth.
4. Pour mixture over peaches.
5. Bake for 50 to 60 minutes, or until golden brown. Makes 8 servings.
